violations.description: INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): The building containing the food service was noted with a structure which would allow the entrance of insects and/ or rodents. Air gap beneath back door needs repair weather strip.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor in prep area noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): One reachin freezer in front service area noted in need of defrost.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor in prep area noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Open top freezer needs defrost and cleaned out.
